## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:
- Rollback plan (if needed):

## Pre-merge Checklist

- [ ] Latest `CI` workflow is green in Actions.
- [ ] `git status` is clean locally.
- [ ] No local artifacts/secrets in changes (`.env*`, `logs/`, `.venv/`, `vision-ocr-bot-key.json`, `.DS_Store`).
- [ ] If parser/OCR logic changed, ran `python3 test_parser.py` locally.
- [ ] Diff was self-reviewed before merge.
